response_preview:
Found it. Service file is at `/home/jellybot/.config/systemd/user/nanoclaw-v2-1445eeba.service`. Since the user bus isn't reachable via sudo, just remove the file and its wants symlink directly:

```bash
! sudo kill 2387 && sudo rm /home/jellybot/.config/systemd/user/nanoclaw-v2-1445eeba.service /home/jellybot/.config/systemd/user/default.target.wants/nanoclaw-v2-1445eeba.service
```

That kills it now and removes it from startup permanently. Pulse will grab the Telegram bot on its 30s retry — y
